claim_id.description: Unique claim identifier (e.g. CLM-20260622-INVOICE-A3F9B1). Required for traceability. Must be echoed in summary_report and audit_trail.

final_decision.description: The human reviewer's final decision from HITL_Reviewer_Decision. Exactly one of: Approve, Partial Approve, Reject, Request Documents. Must be echoed exactly as received — never modified or paraphrased.

reviewer_notes.description: Free-text notes entered by the human reviewer during HITL_Reviewer_Decision. Include verbatim in the summary report under reviewer commentary section.

analysis_result_json.description: JSON string output from AG_Claim_Analysis_Core. Contains category, eligible, documents_complete, analysis_confidence, key_document_facts, recommendation. Parse as JSON before use.

fraud_risk_json.description: JSON string output from AG_Fraud_Risk. Contains fraudRisk.level, fraudRisk.score, fraudRisk.signals, fraudRisk.reasoning. Parse as JSON before use.

decision_support_json.description: JSON string output from AG_Decision_Support. Contains recommendation, recommendation_confidence, recommendation_rationale, key_risk_factors, suggested_settlement_notes. Parse as JSON before use.

reviewer_package.description: Consolidated multi-section reviewer package from WF_Prepare_Reviewer_Package. Used as supplementary context for summary generation. Contains validation results, analysis excerpts, and document facts.

knowledge_bundle.description: Loaded KB content from WF_Load_Agent_Knowledge for AG_Final_Summary. Contains summary templates and audit trail formatting rules. If empty, proceed with built-in format.

summary_report.description: Structured human-readable settlement summary report. Must include clearly labeled sections: Claim ID, Final Decision (echoed exactly), Claim Category, Eligibility Outcome, Fraud Risk Level and Score, AI Recommendation vs Human Decision comparison (with alignment status), Reviewer Commentary (verbatim reviewer_notes), Key Document Facts, Settlement Notes, and Summary Confidence. Format with section headers for readability.

audit_trail.description: Pipe-separated chronological audit log. Each entry format: CLAIM_ID|STEP_NAME|OUTCOME|TIMESTAMP_UTC. Required steps in order: DOCUMENT_EXTRACTION, BUSINESS_VALIDATION, CLAIM_ANALYSIS, FRAUD_RISK_ASSESSMENT, DECISION_SUPPORT, HUMAN_REVIEW, FINAL_DECISION, SUMMARY_GENERATED. All entries must include claim_id as the first segment. SUMMARY_GENERATED timestamp must be actual current UTC time at generation. Entries separated by ' | ' (space-pipe-space).

processing_metadata.description: Structured metadata object capturing key processing attributes for downstream record storage.

claim_id.description: Echo of the input claim_id. Must match exactly.

final_decision.description: Echo of the human reviewer's final_decision. Must match exactly — never modified.

category.description: Claim category from AG_Claim_Analysis_Core. One of: Healthcare, Vehicle, Travel.

fraud_risk_level.description: Fraud risk level from AG_Fraud_Risk. One of: low, medium, high.

fraud_risk_score.description: Numeric fraud risk score 0–100 from AG_Fraud_Risk.

summary_confidence.description: Overall settlement outcome confidence score 0.0–1.0. Calculated from recommendation_confidence adjusted for human-AI alignment and fraud risk. Higher when human decision aligns with AI recommendation. Capped at 0.70 when reviewer overrides AI recommendation. Floor: 0.20. Ceiling: 0.90.

processed_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of when this summary was generated. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ. Must reflect the actual current UTC time at generation — never hardcoded or copied from inputs.
